reasoning: As of late 2025, there is absolutely no Ascariasis vaccine in or even close to human clinical trials. Scientific consensus places any potential vaccine at least 5-10 years away due to the biological complexity of the parasite and lack of animal models. Therefore, the chance of a vaccine genuinely being developed and recognized by November 2025 or January 2026 is effectively zero. The only scenarios where this resolves 'Yes' are temporary Wikipedia vandalism or a misguided editor prematurely marking 'Yes' due to a pre-clinical discovery. These edge cases warrant a floor probability of ~5-7%, increasing slightly over time to account for growing but still extremely small horizon uncertainty.
